tools.name: search_businesses
tools.description: Search the ANOTS directory for businesses whose AI agent can answer a question or need. Returns matching businesses with their slug, name, what they do, and agent-card URL. Use this first to discover which agents to ask.

tools.name: ask_business
tools.description: Ask a specific business's ANOTS agent a question, by slug. The agent answers from that business's own knowledge base and tools (live data, not scraped HTML). Get the slug from search_businesses.

tools.name: find_and_ask
tools.description: Discover the most relevant ANOTS businesses for a need AND ask each one in a single step, returning their answers side by side. The fastest way to answer a purchase-intent or research question across the directory.
